core_mechanism: Expressing the interaction energy between separated bodies as the trace-logarithm (functional determinant) of an operator assembled from each body's individual transition/scattering operator, evaluated as a convergent multiple-scattering series — a T-matrix/multiple-scattering expansion of a coupling energy
brief_reason: The abstract describes the interaction (Casimir) energy written in terms of transition operators and computed together with scattering data via a convergent formula, i.e. a multiple-scattering/T-matrix expansion of an interaction energy between two objects.
